---
title: "PTI metadata report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    fig_width: 9
    fig_height: 6
params:
  shp_path: NULL
  mtdt_path: NULL
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  error   = FALSE,
  cache   = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 9,
  fig.height = 6,
  out.width  = "100%"
)

if (is.null(params$shp_path) || is.null(params$mtdt_path)) {
  stop(
    "metadata.Rmd: params 'shp_path' and 'mtdt_path' must be supplied. ",
    "Render this template via `compile_pti_data()`, not directly."
  )
}

shp_dta <- readRDS(params$shp_path)
inp_dta <- devPTIpack::fct_template_reader(params$mtdt_path)
```

```{r intro, results = "asis"}
cat("This report documents every indicator in the merged metadata file ",
    "with a choropleth map at the indicator's most disaggregated admin ",
    "level. It is rendered automatically by `compile_pti_data()` and ",
    "ships alongside `metadata.xlsx` and `shapefiles.zip` as part of the ",
    "deployment bundle.\n\n", sep = "")

cat("- **Source shapes:** `", basename(params$shp_path), "`  \n",
    "- **Source metadata:** `", basename(params$mtdt_path), "`  \n",
    "- **Layers:** ", length(shp_dta), "  \n",
    "- **Polygons (total):** ",
    sum(vapply(shp_dta, NROW, integer(1))), "  \n",
    "- **Indicators:** ", NROW(inp_dta$metadata), "  \n",
    "- **Pillars:** ",
    length(unique(inp_dta$metadata$pillar_group)), "\n\n",
    sep = "")
```

```{r per-indicator, results = "asis"}
metadata <- inp_dta$metadata
metadata <- metadata[order(metadata$pillar_group, metadata$var_order,
                           metadata$var_name), , drop = FALSE]

prev_pillar <- ""

for (i in seq_len(NROW(metadata))) {
  row <- metadata[i, , drop = FALSE]

  # New pillar header
  if (!identical(row$pillar_group, prev_pillar)) {
    cat("\n\n## ", row$pillar_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
    prev_pillar <- row$pillar_group
  }

  cat("\n\n### ", row$var_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
  if (!is.na(row$var_description) &&
      nchar(row$var_description) > 0L) {
    cat(row$var_description, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }

  # Build a one-row plotting frame: a tibble with the admin-level slot
  # carrying just the keys + this indicator. `gg_admin_list()` then
  # produces a list of ggplot maps; we take the first.
  level_slot <- row$spatial_level
  if (is.na(level_slot) || !nzchar(level_slot)) {
    # Default to the most disaggregated layer.
    level_slot <- names(shp_dta)[length(shp_dta)]
  }
  layer_df <- inp_dta[[level_slot]]
  if (is.null(layer_df) || !(row$var_code %in% names(layer_df))) {
    cat("_Indicator not found at_ `", level_slot, "` _level — skipping._\n\n",
        sep = "")
    next
  }

  keep_cols <- c(
    grep("^admin\\d+(Pcod|Name)$", names(layer_df), value = TRUE),
    row$var_code
  )
  plot_dta <- list()
  plot_dta[[level_slot]] <- layer_df[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

  map_list <- try(
    devPTIpack::gg_admin_list(plot_dta, mt = shp_dta, metadata = metadata),
    silent = TRUE
  )

  if (inherits(map_list, "try-error") || length(map_list) == 0L) {
    cat("_Map render failed for this indicator._\n\n")
    next
  }

  print(map_list[[1]])
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
